name: Ryukyu Kingdom
note: Unified the three kingdoms of Okinawa (Sanzan period) under Sho Hashi. A major maritime trading state linking Japan, China, Korea, and Southeast Asia. Became a tributary of Ming China while maintaining independence. Invaded by Japan's Satsuma domain in 1609 and became a dual tributary of both China and Japan. Formally annexed by Japan as Okinawa Prefecture in 1879.
